name: Black Bottom Goodies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, baking soda, salt, sugar, and cocoa in a large bowl; make a well in the center of the mixture.
2. Combine water, oil, vinegar, and vanilla; add to dry ingredients, stirring well.
3. Spoon batter into paper-lined miniature muffin pans, filling 2/3 full.
4. In a separate bowl, combine cream cheese, egg, sugar, and salt; stir until well combined.
5. Stir in chocolate mini-morsels.
6. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of the cream cheese mixture over the chocolate batter.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 to 15 minutes.
